channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Inside the plan to kill Ali Khamenei - Financial Times
item.description:
1. Inside the plan to kill Ali Khamenei  Financial Times
  2. Which Iranian Leaders Have Been Killed and Who Survived?  WSJ
  3. Khamenei's death met with public mourning, quiet celebrations as regime's opponents wait for an opening  NBC News
  4. A look at some of the contenders to be Iran’s supreme leader after the killing of Khamenei  AP News
  5. News Analysis: Trump is rewriting the ‘you break it, you own it’ rule in Iran war  Los Angeles Times

1. IDF strike kills Hezbollah intel chief; Lebanon to ban terror group’s military activity  The Times of Israel

item.title: Starmer seeks to carve out distinct UK approach to this conflict - BBC
item.description:

item.title: Live updates: Trump warns Iran about larger strikes as war spirals in Middle East - CNN
item.description:

item.title: France offers to deploy nuclear deterrent across Europe for first time - Financial Times

item.title: Thousands of flights cancelled as world faces worst travel chaos since Covid crisis - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Thousands of flights cancelled as world faces worst travel chaos since Covid crisis  The Guardian

  4. Airline Stocks Tumble as Iran War Expands Across the Middle East  The New York Times

item.title: As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines - The New York Times
item.description:
1. As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines  The New York Times

item.description:

item.title: We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said. - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post
  2. 6 Conservative Voters React to Attacks on Iran Ahead of the Texas Primaries  The New York Times
  3. Just one in four Americans say they back US strikes on Iran, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds  Reuters
  4. 1 in 4 Americans back Trump’s Iran strikes, most say he’s too quick to use force: poll  Fox News
  5. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN

item.title: Iran Strikes U.S. Military Facilities in Dubai, Bahrain and Other Middle East Locations - The New York Times

item.title: US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US-Israel war on Iran dramatically expands across Middle East  The Guardian

  4. In New York, Fury, Anxiety and Joy Over the Attacks on Iran  The New York Times

item.title: Live Updates: U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran widens - PBS
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran widens  PBS
  2. Bowen: Three days in, we still have no idea where this war is heading  BBC
  3. Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours  The Washington Post
  4. Iran’s military options limited as it tries to hit back at US-Israeli attack  The Guardian
  5. Iran after 48 hours: Tactical success, strategic uncertainty  CNN
